Thought for 14s

Current financial narrative (mid-2026): Markets are resilient but concentrated in AI/tech and energy. Earnings drive gains, but leadership is narrow, consumer pressures are rising (inflation, energy costs), and valuations are rich in many US growth areas. AI capex continues strongly (hyperscalers spending heavily), supporting related stocks. International stocks (like VXUS) have outperformed recently due to valuations and currency, offering diversification. Economy resilient but slowing growth/inflation risks persist. Focus on quality growth with reasonable valuations, AI beneficiaries, and international/emerging exposure for 1-3 year horizon.⁠Schwab +1

Portfolio summary: Heavy crypto (COIN, etc.—keep as you're bullish), big winners (NEM, MRVL, GOOG, TSLA, AVGO, etc.), many losers in tech/consumer (ACN, PYPL, ADBE, NKE). Diversified but some small/bleeding positions. Trim losers where thesis broken; add to high-conviction large caps/ETFs on dips.

Recommendations table (focus high-conviction, large-cap/fairly valued, undervalued ETFs, growth; short reasoning; 1-3yr view):

Asset	Action	Reasoning
COIN, HOOD, TSLA, AVGO, MRVL, AMD, QCOM	Hold (add on dips if bullish)	Crypto bullish per you; AI/semiconductor leaders with strong capex tailwinds. Large-cap growth, reasonable forward outlook despite volatility.
VXUS, VWO, VEA	Buy/add	International/EM undervalued relative to US; recent outperformance + diversification. Low-cost, broad exposure. VXUS fairly/cheap vs US tech concentration.⁠YouTube +1
VOO, SCHD, RSP	Hold/add	Core US large-cap/quality dividend exposure. Broad, fairly valued for long-term.
META, MSFT, AMZN, GOOG	Hold (add if dip)	High-confidence AI/cloud growth leaders. Strong moats, earnings power. META/MSFT often cited as top growth.
ACN, PYPL, ADBE, NKE	Sell/trim most	Big unrealized losses; consumer/tech facing headwinds, slower growth, richer valuations. Capital better elsewhere (tax loss harvest).
CAG, GIS, KHC, PEP, KO	Trim/hold selective	Defensive staples but limited growth; some underperformance. Keep KO/PEP for stability if wanted.
ORCL	Hold	AI/cloud beneficiary, forward valuation attractive post-pullback.
PFE, BMY, VHT	Hold selective	Healthcare stable; add quality pharma on weakness.
Energy (XOM, CVX, XLE, LNG)	Hold/trim profits	Strong narrative but cyclical; good gains already.
Small/losers (LYFT, COUR, EPAM, ESTC, etc.)	Sell/trim	Tiny positions, weak performance; redeploy to larger ideas.
NEM, PHYS, GDX, URNM	Hold	Gold/miners strong diversifier/inflation hedge; big gains.
New: NVDA (if not held), AVGO add, or LLY	Buy	Top AI/growth large-caps with momentum and reasonable forward valuations in lists.⁠Money.usnews

Overall strategy: Sell/trim ~10-20% of losers (ACN/PYPL/consumer) to fund adds to VXUS/international, more META/MSFT/AMZN/AVGO, or broad ETFs. Keep crypto tilt. Prioritize quality large-caps with AI/moat exposure and international diversification. Rebalance toward fewer, higher-conviction holdings. Not financial advice—consider your risk, taxes, goals. Markets volatile; 1-3yr favors selective growth + value internationally.
